title: Liquidations become executable in the same transaction as the price manipulation
reason: Merged into F-002 as the same root issue: liquidation eligibility and borrow sizing both consume manipulable same-transaction market state.

title: Zero-amount LLAMMA exchanges appear to mutate market state for free
reason: The exploit uses zero-amount `exchange` calls as a likely poke, but this file alone does not prove the call changes protocol state in a distinct, reportable way rather than being incidental to the broader oracle/state-manipulation issue.
